name: Decidim specialist provider
best_use: First fake-data sandbox build where Decidim-specific setup and admin handover matter most
risk: Higher cash cost but lower delivery risk
required_proof: Live Decidim examples; version plan; hosting plan; admin handover; acceptance evidence; AGPL/source-code note

name: Ruby on Rails civic tech studio
best_use: Provider with strong Rails and PostgreSQL skills that can prove Decidim capability
risk: May underestimate Decidim configuration or AGPL obligations
required_proof: Rails references; Decidim learning plan; deployment plan; QA approach; handover evidence
next_action: Send RFQ with Decidim proof request

name: Partner-hosted civic organisation
best_use: Trusted partner can host and support under Barayamal oversight
risk: Control admin access backups and handover can become unclear
required_proof: Partner role note; admin owner; backup owner; support owner; export path; assurance sign-off
next_action: Hold until governance controls are explicit

name: Cloud DevOps plus Rails contractor
best_use: Infrastructure setup paired with a separate Decidim application owner
risk: May solve hosting while leaving participation configuration weak
required_proof: Infrastructure diagram; backup plan; monitoring note; access plan; named Decidim app owner

name: Barayamal self-build coach
best_use: Coaching path for long-term maintainership and self-build skills
risk: Slower first sandbox and still blocked by runtime prerequisites
required_proof: Pairing plan; environment setup; documentation; fallback provider path
next_action: Use if capability building is the priority

name: Static-only web contractor
best_use: Public demo polish only not Decidim sandbox build
risk: Could produce another mockup instead of a Decidim app
required_proof: Proof of Decidim app capability before reconsideration
next_action: Do not use for sandbox build
